ab: Kiyama, abalu ku kemasu dra tratruri. karuwa yu pabulas kanku?
ch: W:Kiyama，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎？
en: Kiyama, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: uniyan nanku. nantaw kan Panay idrini.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Panay’s.

ab: karuwa yu pabulas kanku dra palamu? an garemay i, ti parebeliyasanay lla kanu.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎？我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: aiwa. alaku!
en: Sure, take it.

ab: semangalan! semangalan kayu lla i Panay.
en: Thank you and thank Panay for me.

ab: kiyaami yu dra manay?
en: May I help you?

ab: parebabeliyas ku kandri na druwaya etib na tilin.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: aiwa. a manay driya nu kiyaamiyan?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: kiyabulas ku driya kanadri na tuluwa etib na tilin.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: inaba lla. an pukatelu wariyan i, adri kaabalu druwa parebeliyasa.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: adri driya nu parebeliyasan kanku na iyasaus.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: ku parebeliyasan lla a daman.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: daw uniyan ku iyasaus?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了？
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: nu pabulasnay kan Kiyama nay?
en: Did you lend it to Kiyama?

ab: maulid ku i! kayku driya kiyumalla kantaw.
ch: M:我不知道耶！我去問問她。
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: ti pabulasay yu driya kananku iyasaus.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Panay, tu pinabulasan kan Kiyama idri na patratreell kanu?
en: Panay, did Kiyama lend you this coat?

ab: amelli, tu trinimaan kan nanalli idrini.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: mararisan kantu patratreell kan Kiyama.
en: Kiyama’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: a udreudrem tu patratreelr. adri marisan naniyam edad.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Panay, kibulas yu dra paisu kan Kiyama?
en: Panay, did you borrow money from Kiyama?

ab: aiwa. panaan i, parebabeliyas ku kantaw garem kema ku i, abalu ku kemasu dra paisu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: an asuwa i, nu parebabeliyasan lla?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: an daman i, ku parebabeliyasan kantaw lla.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: aiwa. ti rengayaw lla i Kiyama.
en: Okay, I will tell Kiyama for you.
